name: Sergio Cruz
title: Senior Engineering Leader | Business-Technical Integration | AI-Augmented Engineering

roles.title: Senior Director of Software Engineering
responsibilities: Engineering leader across four cross-functional teams within a 40+ person business unit reporting to a business VP. Part of the BU leadership team, connecting engineering priorities to revenue goals and product strategy.

Identified a MySQL casting error that masked partner profitability in a financial reporting pipeline; partnered with business leadership to reprice the program, creating a projected multimillion-dollar annual revenue opportunity.
Led a multi-year data science initiative on a high-value partner program using random forest modeling on live transactional data, increasing close rates 60% and tripling profitability over two years.
Led engineering for a business unit that grew 67% over three years; teams built and maintained the systems, integrations, and data infrastructure that powered that growth.

Applied CDH continuous discovery to quarterly OKRs, helping teams track business metrics and leading indicators instead of output alone. Part of the leadership team driving company-wide Claude Code adoption across 150+ engineers.

Key leader in the org-wide engineering growth tracks initiative: proposed behavioral criteria across six IC levels, led adoption rollout, and built the assessment tool used by engineering leaders twice yearly.

roles.title: Director of Software Engineering
responsibilities: Scaled the engineering organization from 5 to 15+ engineers and leaders within a 40+ person cross-functional business unit, building a management layer and formal career development programs as the team tripled in size.

Owned integration platform strategy, architecting partner data integrations that connected Ramsey customers to mortgage, insurance, and financial providers through direct system integrations and third-party APIs.
Sat at the BU leadership table using EOS and OKRs; drove standardization of CI/CD pipelines, testing standards, and architectural patterns across multiple squads.
Partnered with product, marketing, and operations leadership to align engineering priorities with revenue growth, customer experience, and operational scalability.

roles.title: Associate Director of Software Engineering
responsibilities: First engineering leader for a newly formed business unit. Built the engineering function from a 2-person team while representing engineering on the BU leadership team from day one.

Diagnosed and remediated a critical security and reliability failure in the first weeks: GET requests submitting PII exposed sensitive data in server logs and intermittently hit a 2KB load balancer limit that silently dropped requests.
Built the initial partner integration suite across mortgage, insurance, legal, and financial services, scaling the team from 2 to 8 engineers to support 3x revenue growth.

experience.title: Engineering Manager
responsibilities: First technical hire building consumer-facing app.
Scaled product to handle 7-digit monthly signups and 8-digit revenue.
Hired and mentored technical team.
Defined engineering standards, reviewed code, and led technical growth.

roles.title: Tech Lead
responsibilities: Led UI efforts for engineering squad.
Built SPAs and integrated with enterprise systems.

roles.title: Software Engineer
responsibilities: Built Code School course builder in Ruby on Rails.
Used Docker for secure code sandboxes.
Created and presented content on Node.js, React, Angular.
Spoke at industry conferences.

experience.title: Sr. Software Engineer
responsibilities: Built dynamic social media app using Angular.
Integrated with in-house API using OAuth.
Contributed to REST API standards.

experience.title: Software Engineer
responsibilities: Developed enterprise-grade travel software.

experience.title: Software Engineer
responsibilities: First engineering hire for consumer product.
Built end-to-end gift-giving experience.
